name: the --project flag records the project_id in the consult output
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload x --project FEAT-560B --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'exit(JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["project_id"]=="FEAT-560B" ? 0:1)' && echo project-id-recorded 1>&2
